purpose: Unifies rank advice for all implemented target heroes with a five-tier progression per target/enemy pair.
rules: All 17 implemented target heroes must have 51 rank-advice rows.
Each row must contain bronze, silver, gold, platinum, and diamond_plus advice.
Advice must be rank-specific, not a repeated fallback sentence.
Runtime detail rendering must prefer the v50.9 rank-advice DB before older row-level rank fields.
Existing row-level rank advice remains available as fallback through Pack B normalization.
